content.text:
Tóm lại, đã giải quyết đúng yêu cầu của bạn:

**1. Giải thích & fix lệch số:** 19.39% là do mình dùng nhầm harness tự chế (giá local + RSI/4-gate tự tính + alloc rời rạc). Canonical thật = `sim_dt4g_macro_overlay.py` (BQ + weight-ceiling). Đã chuyển hẳn sang canonical; bản clone `sim_dt4g_macro_overlay_bgate.py` **tái tạo chính xác 19.17%/20.10%/113.3B** (harness-identity check pass) trước khi thêm gate.

**2. Gate chạy lại trên ĐÚNG config đó:** NAV-neutral (+0.01pp), gỡ 2 episode nascent, giữ nguyên mọi crisis. Đính chính: "+0.20pp" lượt trước là artifact harness sai.

**3. Quy ước đã khóa vào memory:** mọi kiểm thử DT5G từ nay chạy trên canonical harness để luôn so sánh được với 20.10%.

**Khuyến nghị thực dụng:**
- **DT5G de-risk arm: giữ** — giá trị thật +0.93pp full, chủ yếu là bảo hiểm 2008/2011 (2011 +12.9pp in-window). Bảo hiểm, không phải alpha.
- **Breadth gate: tùy chọn, "free insurance"** — không tốn return, không mất crisis, phòng decoupling tương lai + vệ sinh noise nascent. Đáng thêm nếu bạn muốn robust, nhưng đừng kỳ vọng nó tăng lợi nhuận. Nếu thêm thì cần đưa breadth_MA200 vào feed daily.

Artifacts: `sim_dt4g_macro_overlay_bgate.py`, `data/dt4g_macro_bgate_nav.csv`. File canonical production + CSV gốc **không bị đụng**.

Bạn muốn mình (a) wire breadth-gate vào `sim_dt4g_macro_overlay.py` canonical (kèm fallback thiếu feed) như một safeguard chính thức, hay (b) dừng ở mức đã-validate và để canonical nguyên trạng?

lastPrompt: bạn cho mình biết tại sao kết quả DT5G của bạn là 19.39%, khác với trong hình. Mình muốn khi kiểm tra kết quả, hãy chạy trên cùng một cấu hình simulation, để dễ so sánh, tránh các kết quả mỗi lần chạy…

content.text:
Tốt. Trước khi wire vào production, mình phải sửa **ngữ nghĩa gate cho an toàn khi chạy LIVE** — đây là điểm tinh tế quan trọng:

Phiên bản test trước của mình "cap chỉ bind nếu breadth hợp lệ & yếu" → khi breadth **thiếu/lỗi feed** thì cap bị **suppress**. Live mà như vậy thì **nguy hiểm**: feed breadth hỏng một hôm → ta vô tình bỏ qua de-risk đúng lúc khủng hoảng. Phải đảo lại thành **fail-safe**: chỉ suppress khi có **bằng chứng decoupling dương tính** (breadth hợp lệ VÀ khỏe ≥0.50); mọi trường hợp khác (breadth yếu / thiếu / rổ nhỏ) → để US cap fire bình thường (không bao giờ mất bảo hiểm crisis vì lỗi data).

Sửa lại semantics rồi chạy lại trên canonical:

input.old_string:
b_valid = (px["Breadth_Total_MA200"].fillna(0) >= BREADTH_MIN_UNIVERSE)
px["breadth_confirm"] = (b_valid & (px["Breadth_MA200"] < BREADTH_TH)).shift(1).fillna(False)
input.new_string:
# PRODUCTION-SAFE semantics: suppress the US cap ONLY on POSITIVE decoupling evidence
# (breadth valid universe>=100 AND HEALTHY >= TH). Missing/weak/small-universe breadth
# => NO suppression => US cap fires (never miss crisis protection on a data gap). Causal (shift 1).
b_valid = (px["Breadth_Total_MA200"].fillna(0) >= BREADTH_MIN_UNIVERSE)
px["us_decoupled"] = (b_valid & (px["Breadth_MA200"] >= BREADTH_TH)).shift(1).fillna(False)

input.new_string:
df["bull"] = ((df["Close"] / df["Close"].shift(P["refi_chg_win"]) - 1 > P["bull_r6m"]) & (df["Close"] > df["MA200"])).shift(1).fillna(False)

    # ── VN-BREADTH DECOUPLING GUARD on Pillar B (free insurance, 2026-05-29) ──
    # Suppress the US-panic cap ONLY when VN breadth is broadly HEALTHY while the US panics
    # (genuine US-VN decoupling, e.g. 2025 VIC-led). FAIL-SAFE: weak / missing / small-universe
    # breadth => NO suppression => US cap fires as usual (never skip crisis protection on a data
    # gap). Breadth = % of ticker_prune above MA200 (the production breadth universe). Causal (T-1).
    df["us_decoupled"] = False
    try:
        bd = bq(f"""SELECT t.time, AVG(IF(t.Close>t.MA200,1.0,0.0)) AS b200, COUNT(*) AS univ
FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS t
WHERE t.ticker IN (SELECT DISTINCT t2.ticker FROM tav2_bq.ticker_prune AS t2)
  AND t.MA200 IS NOT NULL AND t.time BETWEEN DATE '2014-01-01' AND DATE '{end}'
GROUP BY t.time ORDER BY t.time""")
        bd["time"] = pd.to_datetime(bd["time"])
        df = df.merge(bd, on="time", how="left")
        decoup = ((df["univ"].fillna(0) >= P["breadth_min_univ"]) & (df["b200"] >= P["breadth_th"])).shift(1).fillna(False)
        df["us_decoupled"] = decoup.values
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"[get_macro_state] breadth guard inactive ({e}) -> US pillar ungated (fail-safe)")

    # ── fuse to cap level + easing (causal) ──

**✅ BREADTH GATE DEPLOYED (2026-05-29, user approved as "free insurance")** — wired into BOTH production files with **fail-safe LIVE semantics** (different from the first test version): suppress the US/Pillar-B cap ONLY on POSITIVE decoupling evidence = breadth universe≥100 AND `Breadth_MA200 >= 0.50`; weak/missing/small-universe breadth → NO suppression → US cap fires (never skip crisis protection on a data-feed gap; never re-introduce 2001 either — pre-2007 breadth invalid → cap fires as before). Verified 2014-now output UNCHANGED (49 de-risk days, gate dormant in realized modern history = pure forward insurance). (2) `sim_dt4g_macro_overlay.py` (canonical backtest): uses Downloads breadth file (2000+, all-ticker); **canonical DT5G figure 20.10%→20.13%** (+0.03, removed 2009 healthy-breadth false de-risk), base 19.17% & ALL crises identical. toolUseResult.originalFile:
---
name: dt5g-walkforward-event-audit
description: "DT5G macro overlay — walk-forward is wrong tool (IS Δ=0 exactly); edge is n=1 event, deploy as fail-safe gate not alpha"
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: b4d74542-bd56-48c6-8e8a-40f457c1c3ad
---

**Q (user, 2026-05-29): does DT5G need walk-forward to check bias/overfit?** Answer after full ablation: **NO — walk-forward IS/OOS is the WRONG tool for DT5G; the real test is event-level + leave-one-EVENT-out.**

**What DT5G is**: DT 4-gate (v3.4b base + DT_10_25_25 commit, `_dt_4gate` enC=25/exC=10/enX=25/exX=10) + a macro 5th gate (`macro_state_live.py`): Pillar A SBV refi 6m-momentum, Pillar B US VIX/SPX panic (T-1), v3.4b bull-bypass, cap-commit K=7. Asymmetric: DEFENSIVE caps state ceiling, RECOVERY floors at NEUTRAL. `get_gated_state()` fail-closes to DT4-only when feeds stale. Package: `deploy_golive_dt5g_v4`.

**Event-level audit (`audit_dt5g_events.py` → `data/audit_dt5g_events.md`)**: macro state differs from DT4 on only **49/3082 sessions (1.6%), 4 episodes, ALL de-risk, 0 re-risk**. Episodes: 2020-03-16 COVID (14d, EpRet −6.2%), 2020-05-26 (1d), 2023-02-07 (28d, −1.7%), 2023-04-04 (6d, −0.8%). All EpRet≤0 (de-risks all landed on real weakness), **0 fired in bull** (bull-bypass held), **easing/RE-RISK arm NEVER fired in 12y** (pure theory). NOTE: judge overlay by EpRet (differ-window return), NOT T+20/T+60-from-start — those mix in the BASE machine's CRISIS-exit (~10-session) recovery lag which is identical for DT4 & DT5G. (User caught me misreading COVID T+60 +16% as overlay "missed recovery" — wrong; overlay only deviated 14d, base machine missed the recovery.)

**Integrated prod-spec ablation** (`run_5systems_prodspec.py` + new `STATE_OVERRIDE=dt4|dt5g` env hook; 50B, full 2014→2026-05): V5 +0.43pp / V4 +0.27pp FULL. **IS 2014-19 Δ = +0.00pp EXACTLY** (overlay dormant in-sample → IS/OOS split is a tautology, not robustness). OOS 2020-now V5 +0.88 / V4 +0.54. V3 (LIVE state, not overridden) = 0.00 all windows = harness-integrity control. **Per-year LOO: entire edge = single 2023 tightening (+5.00pp/yr V5, +3.34 V4); 2025 bull COSTS −0.89pp; drop 2023 → DT5G ≤ DT4.**

**Verdict (2014+ only)**: not parameter-overfit (params robust plateau, see [[v5-prodspec-integrity-audit]] discipline), but **thin/single-event evidence**. Deploy DT5G as a **fail-safe risk GATE** (as `get_gated_state` already does), NOT a return-enhancer. Consistent with [[fa_layer_ic_audit_2026]] "FA = gate not ranker". Fixed overstated docstring claim (was "+0.88/+0.63pp full" → real prod-spec +0.43/+0.27).

**FULL-HISTORY UPDATE (2000→now, `audit_dt5g_events_2000.py` → `data/audit_dt5g_events_2000.md`)** — user: "đã kiểm tra toàn bộ 2000→now, làm lại". Rebuilt fusion on LOCAL sources (VNINDEX.csv + v3.4b full CSV + us_market_history.csv, all 2000+), importing macro_state_live helpers/params verbatim. **23 episodes (17 pre-2014, 6 post-2014)** — 2014+ window drastically under-samples. KEY REVERSALS: (1) **De-risk arm = crisis insurance, validated pre-2014**: 2008 GFC EpRet −22.8% (79d) + 2011 inflation crisis −17.3% (181d, SBV 14-15%) both correctly avoided — THIS is the overlay's raison d'être, 2014+ just had no crisis that big. 9/11 de-risks correct. (2) **2001-10 catastrophic false positive**: post-9/11 US VIX forced CRISIS onto VN bubble rallying **+31.3%, in_bull=YES → bull-bypass FAILED** (US-VN decoupling, see [[feedback_us_vn_correlation_interpretation]]) → argues for VN-local override on US pillar. (3) **Easing/RE-RISK arm is NOT dead code** (my 2014+-only claim was WRONG): fired 12× in 2012-14 SBV easing cycle but record POOR — mean T+60 −2.27%, re-entered into ongoing 2012 decline → recommend DISABLE/tighten easing floor. Caveat: pre-2014 SBV dates ±1-2mo, v3.4b IC-valid 2011+ only, immature pre-2007 market — directional not precise.

**PURE-INDEX NAV value + easing-off ablation (`test_dt5g_fullhist_nav.py` → `data/dt5g_fullhist_nav.md`, 2026-05-29)** — integrated stock-selection can't run pre-2014 (BQ ticker 2014+), so isolates state→allocation channel on VNINDEX. (a) Overlay value: Full +0.79pp / **2003+ (drop nascent 2001, per user) +1.10pp** / PRE14 2003-13 +1.78pp / MODERN 2014+ +0.54pp. **Value is crisis-driven not steady alpha**: 2011 inflation window DT4 −13.5%→DT5G +2.7% (**+16.2pp**), 2008 GFC +6.4pp — these two crises ARE the overlay; crisis-free 2014+ = modest +0.5pp. "Insurance not alpha" confirmed w/ magnitudes. (b) **Easing-off ablation REVISES my earlier "disable easing" call**: net full-history caps-only is marginally better (+0.94 vs +0.79) BUT entirely from pre-2014 (2012 era easing cost −3.4pp, premature re-entry into falling market). **In matured 2014+ regime easing arm is net POSITIVE (+0.27pp)** — 2014 SBV-easing re-entries (T+60 +11%) were good. The 2012 failure = same pre-2013 immaturity user discounts (cf [[ba_v11_c3_cons_filter_retune]] SV_TIGHT removal logic). → **KEEP easing arm (fine post-2014); do NOT disable.** Net modern overlay ≈ +0.5pp pure-index, tail-risk insurance.

**⚠️ CANONICAL HARNESS RULE + correction (2026-05-29)** — user caught my DT5G full-history number (19.39%) ≠ canonical (20.10%). ROOT CAUSE: I used an ad-hoc harness (`test_dt5g_fullhist_nav.py`: local VNINDEX.csv + own `_dt_4gate` + Wilder RSI + DISCRETE state→alloc). **CANONICAL DT5G backtest = `sim_dt4g_macro_overlay.py`** → writes `data/dt4g_macro_overlay_nav.csv` (nav_base=DT4 **19.17%/92.7B**, nav_macro=DT5G **20.10%/113.3B**, 112 transitions); uses **BQ** `tav2_bq.ticker` VNINDEX (HAS full history 2000+, unlike individual stocks) + `vnindex_5state_dt_4gate` + BQ MA200/D_RSI, macro applied as a **continuous weight-ceiling** `tgt=min(tgt,STATE_ALLOC[cap])`. `sim_dt4g_macro_html.py` only VISUALIZES that cached NAV. **RULE: all DT5G tests MUST use the canonical harness (clone `sim_dt4g_macro_overlay_bgate.py` reproduces 19.17/20.10 exactly); never the local discrete harness.** Canonical DT5G value: FULL +0.93pp, **2011 inflation in-window +12.9pp (base +1.44%→macro +14.35%)**, GFC ~flat, modern +0.48pp. **Breadth-gate on canonical = NAV-NEUTRAL (+0.01pp full, 20.10→20.11)** — my earlier "+0.20pp from gate" was a wrong-harness artifact; gate removes 2 nascent episodes (9→7, cap-days 1638→1127), preserves ALL crises identically, free decoupling-insurance but NOT a return improver. Files: `sim_dt4g_macro_overlay_bgate.py`, `data/dt4g_macro_bgate_nav.csv`.

lines: **PURE-INDEX NAV value + easing-off ablation (`test_dt5g_fullhist_nav.py` → `data/dt5g_fullhist_nav.md`, 2026-05-29)** — integrated stock-selection can't run pre-2014 (BQ ticker 2014+), so isolates state→allocation channel on VNINDEX. (a) Overlay value: Full +0.79pp / **2003+ (drop nascent 2001, per user) +1.10pp** / PRE14 2003-13 +1.78pp / MODERN 2014+ +0.54pp. **Value is crisis-driven not steady alpha**: 2011 inflation window DT4 −13.5%→DT5G +2.7% (**+16.2pp**), 2008 GFC +6.4pp — these two crises ARE the overlay; crisis-free 2014+ = modest +0.5pp. "Insurance not alpha" confirmed w/ magnitudes. (b) **Easing-off ablation REVISES my earlier "disable easing" call**: net full-history caps-only is marginally better (+0.94 vs +0.79) BUT entirely from pre-2014 (2012 era easing cost −3.4pp, premature re-entry into falling market). **In matured 2014+ regime easing arm is net POSITIVE (+0.27pp)** — 2014 SBV-easing re-entries (T+60 +11%) were good. The 2012 failure = same pre-2013 immaturity user discounts (cf [[ba_v11_c3_cons_filter_retune]] SV_TIGHT removal logic). → **KEEP easing arm (fine post-2014); do NOT disable.** Net modern overlay ≈ +0.5pp pure-index, tail-risk insurance.

**⚠️ CANONICAL HARNESS RULE + correction (2026-05-29)** — user caught my DT5G full-history number (19.39%) ≠ canonical (20.10%). ROOT CAUSE: I used an ad-hoc harness (`test_dt5g_fullhist_nav.py`: local VNINDEX.csv + own `_dt_4gate` + Wilder RSI + DISCRETE state→alloc). **CANONICAL DT5G backtest = `sim_dt4g_macro_overlay.py`** → writes `data/dt4g_macro_overlay_nav.csv` (nav_base=DT4 **19.17%/92.7B**, nav_macro=DT5G **20.10%/113.3B**, 112 transitions); uses **BQ** `tav2_bq.ticker` VNINDEX (HAS full history 2000+, unlike individual stocks) + `vnindex_5state_dt_4gate` + BQ MA200/D_RSI, macro applied as a **continuous weight-ceiling** `tgt=min(tgt,STATE_ALLOC[cap])`. `sim_dt4g_macro_html.py` only VISUALIZES that cached NAV. **RULE: all DT5G tests MUST use the canonical harness (clone `sim_dt4g_macro_overlay_bgate.py` reproduces 19.17/20.10 exactly); never the local discrete harness.** Canonical DT5G value: FULL +0.93pp, **2011 inflation in-window +12.9pp (base +1.44%→macro +14.35%)**, GFC ~flat, modern +0.48pp. **Breadth-gate on canonical = NAV-NEUTRAL (+0.01pp full, 20.10→20.11)** — my earlier "+0.20pp from gate" was a wrong-harness artifact; gate removes 2 nascent episodes (9→7, cap-days 1638→1127), preserves ALL crises identically, free decoupling-insurance but NOT a return improver. Files: `sim_dt4g_macro_overlay_bgate.py`, `data/dt4g_macro_bgate_nav.csv`.

+**✅ BREADTH GATE DEPLOYED (2026-05-29, user approved as "free insurance")** — wired into BOTH production files with **fail-safe LIVE semantics** (different from the first test version): suppress the US/Pillar-B cap ONLY on POSITIVE decoupling evidence = breadth universe≥100 AND `Breadth_MA200 >= 0.50`; weak/missing/small-universe breadth → NO suppression → US cap fires (never skip crisis protection on a data-feed gap; never re-introduce 2001 either — pre-2007 breadth invalid → cap fires as before). (1) `macro_state_live.py` (LIVE): P adds `breadth_th=0.50, breadth_min_univ=100`; get_macro_state runs a BQ breadth query (% of ticker_prune above MA200, 2014+), `us_decoupled` shift-1, gates Pillar B (`if bull[t] or decoup[t]`); try/except fail-safe. Verified 2014-now output UNCHANGED (49 de-risk days, gate dormant in realized modern history = pure forward insurance). (2) `sim_dt4g_macro_overlay.py` (canonical backtest): uses Downloads breadth file (2000+, all-ticker); **canonical DT5G figure 20.10%→20.13%** (+0.03, removed 2009 healthy-breadth false de-risk), base 19.17% & ALL crises identical. Refreshed `data/dt4g_macro_overlay_nav.csv` + `vnindex_5state_dt4_macro.csv` + report; `sim_dt4g_macro_html.py` dashboard will show 20.13 on re-run. Slight breadth-source diff (live=BQ prune 2014+, backtest=Downloads all-ticker 2000+) is immaterial: gate never fires in 2014+ realized history either way. Threshold robust [0.40,0.60] (no episode breadth in that band). Breadth feed for live = computed fresh from BQ each call (no Downloads dependency).

aiTitle: Evaluate DT5G walking forward test for bias

content.text:
Đã deploy xong. Giờ giải thích đầy đủ, rõ ràng về breadth gate và cách nó áp vào DT5G hiện tại.

---

# Breadth Gate cho DT5G — giải thích đầy đủ

## 1. Vấn đề nó giải quyết: US-VN decoupling

DT5G có **Pillar B (US panic)**: khi VIX/SPX của Mỹ hoảng loạn → ép hạ trạng thái VN (cap về CRISIS/BEAR). Logic này đúng khi 2 thị trường cùng rơi (2008, 2020). **Nhưng có lúc VN tách khỏi Mỹ** — Mỹ giật mình mà nội tại VN vẫn khỏe. Lúc đó cap theo Mỹ là **sai** (cú 2009-06-02: Mỹ wobble, VN 90% mã trên MA200, de-risk hụt +20%; và kiểu 2025 VNI +42% do VIC kéo).

`bull-bypass` cũ chỉ đỡ khi VN **đã** trong bull 6 tháng — quá chậm để bắt decoupling sớm. Cần một tín hiệu **nội tại VN** trực tiếp.

## 2. Ý tưởng cốt lõi

> Trước khi cho phép Mỹ ép VN de-risk, hỏi: **"nội bộ thị trường VN có đang yếu thật không?"** Đo bằng **breadth** = % cổ phiếu trên MA200. Nếu đa số cổ phiếu VN vẫn khỏe trong khi Mỹ hoảng → đó là decoupling → **bỏ qua tín hiệu Mỹ**.

Vì sao dùng **MA200** (dài hạn) chứ không MA50: 2008-07 breadth_MA50 = 0.68 ("khỏe" do nảy bear-market) nhưng MA200 = 0.02 (chết) → MA200 phân biệt đúng crisis thật.

## 3. Luật chính xác (production-safe)

```
us_decoupled = (universe ≥ 100 mã)  AND  (Breadth_MA200 ≥ 0.50)        # lệch T-1, causal

Pillar B (US cap) chỉ kích hoạt khi:   KHÔNG bull  VÀ  KHÔNG us_decoupled
```

| Tình huống | breadth | Hành động | Ví dụ |
|---|---|---|---|
| Mỹ hoảng + VN cũng yếu | MA200 < 0.50 | **Cap fire** (đúng) | 2008 (0.02), 2020 (0.30), 2023 (0.24) |
| Mỹ hoảng + VN khỏe | MA200 ≥ 0.50 | **Suppress** (decoupling) | 2009 (0.90), 2025-type |
| breadth thiếu/lỗi feed | NaN/univ<100 | **Cap fire** (fail-safe) | feed hỏng, hoặc pre-2007 |

**Điểm mấu chốt fail-safe:** chỉ suppress khi có **bằng chứng decoupling DƯƠNG TÍNH**. Mọi trường hợp mơ hồ (breadth yếu, thiếu, rổ nhỏ) → để cap fire bình thường → **không bao giờ bỏ lỡ bảo hiểm crisis vì lỗi data**. Pillar A (SBV nội địa) và bull-bypass **giữ nguyên** — gate chỉ chạm Pillar B.

## 4. Đã wire vào đâu trong hệ thống DT5G

**(a) `macro_state_live.py` — LIVE (paper-trade + go-live + recommenders):**
- Thêm `breadth_th=0.50, breadth_min_univ=100` vào dict `P`.
- `get_macro_state()` query BQ tươi mỗi lần: `% ticker_prune trên MA200` → `us_decoupled` (lệch 1 ngày).
- Fusion: `if bull[t] or decoup[t]: tắt Pillar B`.
- Bọc `try/except` → feed lỗi thì in cảnh báo + chạy như cũ (ungated). **Đã verify: output 2014-now không đổi (49 de-risk days)** → gate dormant trong lịch sử thật = đúng forward-insurance.

**(b) `sim_dt4g_macro_overlay.py` — canonical backtest:**
- Dùng breadth file full-history (2000+) để validate.
- **Canonical DT5G: 20.10% → 20.13%** (+0.03, do bỏ cú decoupling 2009); base 19.17% và **mọi crisis y nguyên**.
- Đã refresh `data/dt4g_macro_overlay_nav.csv`, `vnindex_5state_dt4_macro.csv`, report. Dashboard `dt4g_macro_system.html` sẽ hiện 20.13% khi chạy lại.

## 5. Tác động (chốt số)

| | DT5G cũ | DT5G + gate |
|---|---|---|
| FULL 2000-now | 20.10% | **20.13%** (+0.03) |
| Modern 2014+ | 14.97% | 14.97% (0.00) |
| Mọi crisis (08/11/20/22) | — | **không đổi** |

→ **Free insurance đúng nghĩa**: không tốn return (thậm chí +0.03), không mất một crisis nào, không kích hoạt nhầm lần nào trong lịch sử thật — chỉ phòng cho tương lai (decoupling kiểu 2025).

## 6. Lưu ý vận hành

- **Live tính breadth từ BQ** (`ticker_prune` trên MA200, 2014+) mỗi lần gọi — không phụ thuộc file Downloads. Backtest dùng file Downloads (2000+, all-ticker) để có full history. Hai nguồn khác universe chút nhưng **vô hại**: trong vùng 2014+ thật gate không fire ở cả hai.
- Ngưỡng **0.50 robust** trong [0.40, 0.60] (không episode nào rơi vào band đó → không knife-edge).
- Gate là **một dòng điều kiện thêm vào Pillar B** — không đụng kiến trúc, dễ tắt (set `breadth_min_univ` cực lớn) nếu cần.

**Tóm tắt một câu:** *Breadth gate bảo DT5G "đừng để cú hoảng của Mỹ kéo bạn ra khỏi thị trường nếu phần lớn cổ phiếu VN vẫn đang khỏe" — miễn phí, an toàn khi lỗi data, và chưa từng phải dùng trong quá khứ nên nó thuần túy là bảo hiểm cho lần decoupling tiếp theo.*

Files đã sửa: `macro_state_live.py`, `sim_dt4g_macro_overlay.py` (+ artifacts refresh). Bản nghiên cứu: `sim_dt4g_macro_overlay_bgate.py`. Memory đã ghi.

1,232d0
< # -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
< """
< macro_state_live.py
< ===================
< Reusable LIVE consolidated-macro-state module (production + paper-trade).
< 
< CANONICAL NAME: **DT5G** = DT 4-gate (4 state gates) + Macro 5th gate
<   (macro overlay: SBV money + US panic, bull-bypass, cap-commit K=7, confirmed
<    easing). The "5" = the macro confirmation gate layered on the 4 state gates —
<    NOT a 5-gate state filter (no such model exists). DT5G == DT4G in benign
<    windows; diverges only on persistent macro stress/easing.
< 
< Computes the macro-adjusted 5-state series for any [start, end] window by fusing,
< into ONE causal signal, the three existing rule families (no rule-sprawl):
<   Pillar A  DOMESTIC MONEY  — SBV refi 6m-momentum (sbv_macro_overlay.SBV_REFI_EVENTS)
<   Pillar B  US PANIC        — VIX + SPX 1y drawdown (us_market_history.csv, aligned T-1)
<   + v3.4b BULL-AWARE BYPASS — in a confirmed VN bull, ignore Pillar B, keep Pillar A
< Asymmetric action on the DT-4gate base state:
<   DEFENSIVE  stress  -> CAP state ceiling (CRISIS/BEAR/NEUTRAL)
<   RECOVERY   SBV cut from peak + US calm, CONFIRMED (>=10 sessions persist AND price
<              turn-up Close>Close[t-10]) -> FLOOR at NEUTRAL
< Validated (2026-05-29): pure-index sensitivity plateau (+0.39..+0.76pp, bull-bypass
< essential). INTEGRATED prod-spec ablation (run_5systems_prodspec STATE_OVERRIDE=dt4/dt5g,
< 50B): V5 +0.43pp / V4 +0.27pp FULL; **IS 2014-19 = +0.00pp EXACTLY** (overlay dormant
< in-sample — walk-forward IS/OOS is uninformative here); OOS 2020-now V5 +0.88pp / V4
< +0.54pp. Edge rests on n=4 de-risk episodes (all post-2020, all EpRet<=0, 0 in-bull,
< easing arm never fired); per-year LOO shows the ENTIRE edge = the single 2023 tightening
< (+5pp/yr V5); 2025 bull COSTS -0.89pp. ⇒ DT5G = FAIL-SAFE GATE, not a return-enhancer.
< Causal: US T-1, refi +5d. See validate_macro_report.md + audit_dt5g_events.md.
< 
< API:  get_macro_state(start, end, bq=None) -> DataFrame[time, state, state_dt4, cap, easing]
<       The DT-4gate base is computed on-the-fly from tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v34b_clean
<       ([REDACTED] in sync with the daily-refreshed live table), warmed up from 2014.
< """
< import os, sys
< import numpy as np, pandas as pd
< WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
< sys.path.insert(0, WORKDIR)
< from sbv_macro_overlay import SBV_REFI_EVENTS
< 
< NEUTRAL, CRISIS, BEAR = 3, 1, 2
< # fused-signal params (validated robust plateau; do NOT tune to history)
< P = dict(vix_crisis=35, vix_bear=25, vix_mild=20,
<          spx_crisis=-0.25, spx_bear=-0.15, spx_mild=-0.10,
<          dom_extreme=3.0, dom_strong=1.5, dom_mild=0.5,
<          refi_lag=5, refi_chg_win=126, refi_cut_drop=0.5,
<          ez_confirm=10, ez_price_lb=10,
<          cap_commit=7,          # cap must persist 7 sessions to commit (debounce whipsaw, 2026-05-29)
<          bull_r6m=0.15,
<          breadth_th=0.50,       # US cap suppressed if VN breadth_MA200 >= this (decoupling guard)
<          breadth_min_univ=100)  # ...and only if the breadth universe is this large (else feed/nascent -> no suppress)
< 
< 
< def _commit(arr, K):
<     """Causal dwell: a new cap level must persist K sessions before it commits
<        (debounces both tighten & release -> kills 1-3 day VIX-flicker transitions)."""
<     if K <= 1:
<         return arr.copy()
<     out = arr.copy(); c = arr[0]; ps, pr = arr[0], 1
(exit: 0)

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""Build the two dev hand-off zips. Files keep their REPO-RELATIVE paths so that
unzipping BOTH into one folder (= the dev's WORKDIR) preserves the cross-references
(WORKDIR/deploy_golive_dt5g_v4/..., deploy_v3_4b_package/...). Excludes secrets."""
import os, sys, io, zipfile
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
ROOT = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
DIST = os.path.join(ROOT, "deploy_golive_dt5g_v4", "dist"); os.makedirs(DIST, exist_ok=True)

# (source_relpath, arcname)  — arcname defaults to source_relpath
ZIP1 = [  # DT5G state engine
    "macro_state_live.py", "macro_healthcheck.py", "pull_us_market.py",
    "rebuild_state_from_ticker.bat", "sbv_macro_overlay.py", "build_dt_4gate.py",
    "simulate_holistic_nav.py", "telegram_recommend.py", "telegram_config.template.json",
    "vnindex_5state_ew_v1.py", "build_concentration_history.py", "vnindex_5state_dual_v3.py",
    "deploy_v3_4b_package/build_v3_1_clean.py", "deploy_v3_4b_package/build_v3_4_bull_aware.py",
    "deploy_golive_dt5g_v4/publish_gated_state.py",
    "deploy_golive_dt5g_v4/requirements.txt",
    ("deploy_golive_dt5g_v4/README_zip1_dt5g.md", "deploy_golive_dt5g_v4/README.md"),
]
ZIP2 = [  # V4 + DT5G recommender
    "signal_v11_sql.py", "simulate_holistic_nav.py",
    "compare_v11_v12_concentration_switch.csv", "earnings_events_classified.csv",
    "deploy_golive_dt5g_v4/golive_recommend.py", "deploy_golive_dt5g_v4/golive_daily.bat",
    "deploy_golive_dt5g_v4/requirements.txt",
    "deploy_golive_dt5g_v4/README.md",
    "deploy_golive_dt5g_v4/README_zip2_v4.md",
]
BLOCK = {"telegram_config.json"}  # never ship secrets

def build(name, items):
    path = os.path.join(DIST, name)
    n = 0
    with zipfile.ZipFile(path, "w", zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED) as z:
        for it in items:
            src, arc = (it if isinstance(it, tuple) else (it, it))
            if os.path.basename(src) in BLOCK:
                print(f"  SKIP secret {src}"); continue
            full = os.path.join(ROOT, src.replace("/", os.sep))
            if not os.path.exists(full):
                print(f"  MISSING {src} — skipped"); continue
            z.write(full, arc); n += 1
    print(f"  {name}: {n} files, {os.path.getsize(path)/1024:.0f} KB")
    return path

print("Building dev hand-off zips...")
p1 = build("dt5g_state_engine.zip", ZIP1)
p2 = build("v4_dt5g_recommender.zip", ZIP2)
print("DONE.")
for p in (p1, p2):
    with zipfile.ZipFile(p) as z:
        print(f"\n== {os.path.basename(p)} ==")
        for nm in z.namelist(): print(f"   {nm}")

Xong — zip mới đã chứa bản `macro_state_live.py` có gate (verify: `breadth_th` ✓, `us_decoupled` ✓, fusion `bull[t] or decoup[t]` ✓).

## Cần gửi lại gì cho dev

**Chỉ 1 thứ: `dt5g_state_engine.zip` (ZIP1).**

📦 `deploy_golive_dt5g_v4/dist/dt5g_state_engine.zip` (vừa rebuild, 17 files, 71KB)

**Không cần gửi lại `v4_dt5g_recommender.zip` (ZIP2)** — nó không chứa `macro_state_live.py`, nội dung không đổi.

Lý do: trong toàn bộ hand-off, **chỉ đúng 1 file đổi = `macro_state_live.py`**, và file đó chỉ nằm trong ZIP1. Danh sách file/cấu trúc package **không đổi** (gate không thêm file/dependency nào).

> Nếu muốn gọn hơn nữa: chỉ cần gửi **một file `macro_state_live.py`** để dev thay tại chỗ — tương đương, vì đó là file duy nhất thay đổi.

## Note kèm cho dev (quan trọng)

1. **Không có dependency mới**: breadth tính trực tiếp từ BQ (`tav2_bq.ticker` + `tav2_bq.ticker_prune` — hệ thống đã dùng sẵn). Không thêm package Python, không thêm quyền BQ, không thêm file data.
2. **Backward-compatible + fail-safe**: nếu query breadth lỗi, nó in cảnh báo và **chạy như cũ (ungated)** — không vỡ gì. Thay file là chạy được ngay.
3. **State công bố hôm nay KHÔNG đổi**: gate đang dormant (chưa từng kích hoạt trong lịch sử thật) → bản state dev đang publish giữ nguyên. Gate chỉ tác động khi tương lai có tình huống **Mỹ hoảng + breadth VN khỏe** (decoupling).
4. **Không đổi schema output**: BQ table `vnindex_5state_dt5g_live` giữ nguyên cột. Job daily (`golive_daily.bat` → `publish_gated_state.py`) tự pick up file mới ở lần chạy kế tiếp — dev chỉ cần deploy file, không cần thao tác gì thêm.
5. Thêm đúng 1 BQ query/lần gọi `get_macro_state` (latency nhỏ).

**Tóm tắt 1 câu cho dev:** *"Thay `macro_state_live.py` (hoặc giải nén lại `dt5g_state_engine.zip`) — thêm breadth-decoupling guard cho US pillar, fail-safe, không đổi dependency/schema, state hiện tại giữ nguyên."*

message.content: hãy đặt một tên cho hệ thống DT5G - với gate

content.text:
Theo đúng quy ước đặt tên thi vị của hệ (Tam Quan "Định Tâm", Ngũ Hành "Tinh Tế", v12.1 "Âm Dương Tinh Tế") và bản chất của gate, mình đề xuất:

# DT5G "Nội Quán" 

**(內觀 — quán chiếu vào trong)**

## Vì sao tên này hợp nhất

Bản chất kiến trúc sau khi thêm gate là một **cặp đối ngẫu trong–ngoài**:

| Tầng | Hướng nhìn | Tín hiệu |
|---|---|---|
| Macro overlay (Pillar A+B) | **Ngoại** — nhìn ra ngoài | tiền SBV + hoảng loạn Mỹ |
| **Breadth gate (mới)** | **Nội** — nhìn vào trong | sức khỏe nội tại VN (% mã trên MA200) |

Gate làm đúng một việc: **trước khi để nỗi sợ bên ngoài (Mỹ) kéo mình ra khỏi thị trường, hãy quán chiếu nội lực bên trong (breadth VN) đã** — nếu căn cơ VN còn vững thì không chạy theo hoảng loạn ngoại lai. Đó chính là *nội quán*: tỉnh táo nhìn vào trong thay vì phản ứng với ngoại cảnh.

Tên cũng nối mạch thiền/tuệ của dòng họ tên cũ ("Định Tâm", "Tinh Tế") — rất khớp tông.

## Vài lựa chọn thay thế (nếu bạn thích khác)

- **DT5G "Tự Tại"** (自在) — *an nhiên, không bị ngoại cảnh lay động*. Nhấn vào kết quả (không hoảng theo Mỹ) hơn là cơ chế.
- **DT5G "Cố Bản"** (固本) — *giữ vững gốc rễ*. Breadth = cái gốc; nhưng nghe thiên về "phòng thủ" hơn.
- **DT5G "Định Lực"** — *nội lực vững*. Gọn nhưng ít chất "nhìn vào trong".

## Khuyến nghị

Mình chọn **DT5G "Nội Quán"** — vừa mô tả đúng cơ chế (nhìn breadth nội tại), vừa tạo cặp đối ngẫu đẹp với macro "ngoại quán", vừa hợp tông tên hệ.

Bạn duyệt tên này thì mình sẽ khóa nó vào: docstring `macro_state_live.py` + `sim_dt4g_macro_overlay.py`, README deploy, và memory (registry tên). Hay bạn muốn chọn tên khác trong danh sách trên?

content: tôi thích những cái tên viết tắt và số, dễ nhớ hơn, ví dụ DT5G giờ chuyển thành DT6G hay sao?

message.content: tôi thích những cái tên viết tắt và số, dễ nhớ hơn, ví dụ DT5G giờ chuyển thành DT6G hay sao?

content.text:
Đúng, theo đúng logic đặt tên của chính hệ thống thì **DT6G** là tên chuẩn — và nó *honest* về mặt số đếm:

| # | Gate | Nguồn |
|---|---|---|
| 1–4 | **DT 4-gate** (DT_10_25_25): enter/exit-CRISIS + enter/exit-EXBULL | trạng thái v3.4b |
| 5 | **Macro gate** (SBV money + US panic, fused) | ngoại cảnh |
| 6 | **Breadth-decoupling gate** (mới) | nội lực VN |

Quy ước cũ vốn đã là "số = tổng số gate" (docstring DT5G ghi rõ: "5 = macro gate **thêm vào** 4 state gate, KHÔNG phải 5-gate filter"). Thêm breadth gate = +1 → **DT6G** nối mạch hoàn hảo, không mâu thuẫn. Vừa viết tắt + số, dễ nhớ, đúng gu bạn.

**Nhưng có một quyết định kéo theo** mà bạn cần chọn, vì bạn vừa ship bản "dt5g" cho dev: các định danh vận hành đang mang tên `dt5g` —
- BQ table: `vnindex_5state_dt5g_live`
- Package: `deploy_golive_dt5g_v4`
- File JSON: `golive_state_today.json` (nội bộ)

Đổi tên hệ thống thành DT6G thì có 2 mức:

questions.question: Đổi DT5G → DT6G ở mức nào? (bạn vừa ship bản dt5g cho dev nên đây là điểm cần cân nhắc)

Dev KHÔNG cần hand-off mới ngoài zip macro_state_live.py đã chuẩn bị. Ghi chú: 'table dt5g_live nay phục vụ hệ DT6G'.

aiTitle: Evaluate DT5G walking forward test for bias

content.text:
Đã chốt: **"Chỉ đổi tên hệ thống"** — gọi là DT6G ở tầng tài liệu/code-doc, giữ nguyên định danh vận hành `dt5g` (BQ table, package) để dev không phải hand-off lại.

Kế hoạch chính xác (toàn bộ là sửa text, **0 rủi ro runtime, 0 thao tác dev mới**):

1. Docstring `macro_state_live.py` (định nghĩa gốc của hệ) → DT6G + giải thích gate thứ 6.
2. `sim_dt4g_macro_overlay.py` + bản `_bgate` → DT6G.
3. README deploy → nhãn DT6G + ghi chú "table/package giữ tên dt5g cho continuity".
4. Memory registry → DT6G là tên canonical, DT5G = tên cũ.
5. Một dòng "single source of truth" mapping: DT6G ⇄ vnindex_5state_dt5g_live.

**KHÔNG đụng:** BQ table, package folder, tên file, json — chỉ thêm ghi chú mapping.

Thực hiện:

input.old_string:
CANONICAL NAME: **DT5G** = DT 4-gate (4 state gates) + Macro 5th gate
  (macro overlay: SBV money + US panic, bull-bypass, cap-commit K=7, confirmed
   easing). The "5" = the macro confirmation gate layered on the 4 state gates —
   NOT a 5-gate state filter (no such model exists). DT5G == DT4G in benign
   windows; diverges only on persistent macro stress/easing.
input.new_string:
CANONICAL NAME: **DT6G** (renamed from DT5G 2026-05-29 when the 6th gate was added).
  Gate count (convention: number = total gates):
    1-4  DT 4-gate (DT_10_25_25): enter/exit-CRISIS + enter/exit-EXBULL state commits
    5    Macro gate — SBV money + US panic fused (bull-bypass, cap-commit K=7, confirmed easing)
    6    Breadth-decoupling gate — suppress the US cap when VN breadth is broadly healthy
         while the US panics (US-VN decoupling guard; fail-safe, free insurance)

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# ZIP 1 — DT5G State Engine (`dt5g_state_engine.zip`)

LAYER 1 of the go-live system. Self-updates the Vietnam market 5-state from the freshest
BigQuery `ticker` data, applies the macro overlay (SBV money + US panic), health-checks the
feeds, and publishes a **fail-safe gated state** to BQ for the recommender (ZIP 2) to consume.

## Contents
```
publish_gated_state.py        ENTRY — gated state -> BQ vnindex_5state_dt5g_live + json
macro_state_live.py           DT5G state + get_gated_state() fail-safe gate
macro_healthcheck.py          feed staleness/sanity/heartbeat -> data/macro_health.json (exit 0/1/2)
rebuild_state_from_ticker.bat orchestrates the state chain (BQ ticker -> v3.4b -> DT4-gate), LOCAL only
pull_us_market.py             US VIX/SPX (Pillar B) -> us_market_history.csv
sbv_macro_overlay.py          SBV refi events (Pillar A)
build_dt_4gate.py             DT 4-gate causal commit
simulate_holistic_nav.py      provides bq() + BQ_BIN (BigQuery CLI wrapper)
telegram_recommend.py         optional alert channel (send_telegram_text)
telegram_config.template.json fill in bot_token + chat_id -> save as telegram_config.json (NOT shipped)
chain/                        vnindex_5state_ew_v1.py, build_concentration_history.py, vnindex_5state_dual_v3.py
deploy_v3_4b_package/         build_v3_1_clean.py, build_v3_4_bull_aware.py
requirements.txt
```

## ⚠️ SETUP (must do before running — these are from a research repo)
1. **Hardcoded paths**: every `*.py` and `*.bat` here sets `WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"` (and `simulate_holistic_nav.BQ_BIN` points at a gcloud `bq.cmd`). **Edit these to your environment** (one constant near the top of each file; `rebuild_state_from_ticker.bat` sets `WORKDIR`/`STATE_WORKDIR`). The chain builders honor the `STATE_WORKDIR` env var.
2. **BigQuery**: install Google Cloud SDK, `gcloud auth login`, project `[REDACTED]`, dataset `tav2_bq` (asia-southeast1). Set `BQ_BIN` to your `bq.cmd`/`bq` path.
3. **Python**: `pip install -r requirements.txt` (pandas, numpy, yfinance).
4. **Alerts (optional)**: copy `telegram_config.template.json` → `telegram_config.json`, fill bot_token + chat_id.

## Daily run order
```
python pull_us_market.py
rebuild_state_from_ticker.bat          (or call the chain steps it lists)
python macro_healthcheck.py            # writes data/macro_health.json (HEALTHY/DEGRADED/FAILED)
python publish_gated_state.py          # publishes gated state to BQ + golive_state_today.json
```

## What it guarantees
- The state **tracks BQ `ticker`** (no dependence on a pre-baked, possibly-stale state table).
- `get_gated_state()` serves the macro DT5G state **only when feeds are healthy**; otherwise it
  **fails closed to DT4-only** — never trusts a stale macro cap.
- Output consumed by ZIP 2: BQ table `tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_dt5g_live` + `golive_state_today.json`.

toolUseResult.originalFile:
---
name: dt5g-walkforward-event-audit
description: "DT5G macro overlay — walk-forward is wrong tool (IS Δ=0 exactly); edge is n=1 event, deploy as fail-safe gate not alpha"
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: b4d74542-bd56-48c6-8e8a-40f457c1c3ad
---

**Q (user, 2026-05-29): does DT5G need walk-forward to check bias/overfit?** Answer after full ablation: **NO — walk-forward IS/OOS is the WRONG tool for DT5G; the real test is event-level + leave-one-EVENT-out.**

**What DT5G is**: DT 4-gate (v3.4b base + DT_10_25_25 commit, `_dt_4gate` enC=25/exC=10/enX=25/exX=10) + a macro 5th gate (`macro_state_live.py`): Pillar A SBV refi 6m-momentum, Pillar B US VIX/SPX panic (T-1), v3.4b bull-bypass, cap-commit K=7. Asymmetric: DEFENSIVE caps state ceiling, RECOVERY floors at NEUTRAL. `get_gated_state()` fail-closes to DT4-only when feeds stale. Package: `deploy_golive_dt5g_v4`.

**Event-level audit (`audit_dt5g_events.py` → `data/audit_dt5g_events.md`)**: macro state differs from DT4 on only **49/3082 sessions (1.6%), 4 episodes, ALL de-risk, 0 re-risk**. Episodes: 2020-03-16 COVID (14d, EpRet −6.2%), 2020-05-26 (1d), 2023-02-07 (28d, −1.7%), 2023-04-04 (6d, −0.8%). All EpRet≤0 (de-risks all landed on real weakness), **0 fired in bull** (bull-bypass held), **easing/RE-RISK arm NEVER fired in 12y** (pure theory). NOTE: judge overlay by EpRet (differ-window return), NOT T+20/T+60-from-start — those mix in the BASE machine's CRISIS-exit (~10-session) recovery lag which is identical for DT4 & DT5G. (User caught me misreading COVID T+60 +16% as overlay "missed recovery" — wrong; overlay only deviated 14d, base machine missed the recovery.)

**Integrated prod-spec ablation** (`run_5systems_prodspec.py` + new `STATE_OVERRIDE=dt4|dt5g` env hook; 50B, full 2014→2026-05): V5 +0.43pp / V4 +0.27pp FULL. **IS 2014-19 Δ = +0.00pp EXACTLY** (overlay dormant in-sample → IS/OOS split is a tautology, not robustness). OOS 2020-now V5 +0.88 / V4 +0.54. V3 (LIVE state, not overridden) = 0.00 all windows = harness-integrity control. **Per-year LOO: entire edge = single 2023 tightening (+5.00pp/yr V5, +3.34 V4); 2025 bull COSTS −0.89pp; drop 2023 → DT5G ≤ DT4.**

**Verdict (2014+ only)**: not parameter-overfit (params robust plateau, see [[v5-prodspec-integrity-audit]] discipline), but **thin/single-event evidence**. Deploy DT5G as a **fail-safe risk GATE** (as `get_gated_state` already does), NOT a return-enhancer. Consistent with [[fa_layer_ic_audit_2026]] "FA = gate not ranker". Fixed overstated docstring claim (was "+0.88/+0.63pp full" → real prod-spec +0.43/+0.27).

**FULL-HISTORY UPDATE (2000→now, `audit_dt5g_events_2000.py` → `data/audit_dt5g_events_2000.md`)** — user: "đã kiểm tra toàn bộ 2000→now, làm lại". Rebuilt fusion on LOCAL sources (VNINDEX.csv + v3.4b full CSV + us_market_history.csv, all 2000+), importing macro_state_live helpers/params verbatim. **23 episodes (17 pre-2014, 6 post-2014)** — 2014+ window drastically under-samples. KEY REVERSALS: (1) **De-risk arm = crisis insurance, validated pre-2014**: 2008 GFC EpRet −22.8% (79d) + 2011 inflation crisis −17.3% (181d, SBV 14-15%) both correctly avoided — THIS is the overlay's raison d'être, 2014+ just had no crisis that big. 9/11 de-risks correct. (2) **2001-10 catastrophic false positive**: post-9/11 US VIX forced CRISIS onto VN bubble rallying **+31.3%, in_bull=YES → bull-bypass FAILED** (US-VN decoupling, see [[feedback_us_vn_correlation_interpretation]]) → argues for VN-local override on US pillar. (3) **Easing/RE-RISK arm is NOT dead code** (my 2014+-only claim was WRONG): fired 12× in 2012-14 SBV easing cycle but record POOR — mean T+60 −2.27%, re-entered into ongoing 2012 decline → recommend DISABLE/tighten easing floor. Caveat: pre-2014 SBV dates ±1-2mo, v3.4b IC-valid 2011+ only, immature pre-2007 market — directional not precise.

**PURE-INDEX NAV value + easing-off ablation (`test_dt5g_fullhist_nav.py` → `data/dt5g_fullhist_nav.md`, 2026-05-29)** — integrated stock-selection can't run pre-2014 (BQ ticker 2014+), so isolates state→allocation channel on VNINDEX. (a) Overlay value: Full +0.79pp / **2003+ (drop nascent 2001, per user) +1.10pp** / PRE14 2003-13 +1.78pp / MODERN 2014+ +0.54pp. **Value is crisis-driven not steady alpha**: 2011 inflation window DT4 −13.5%→DT5G +2.7% (**+16.2pp**), 2008 GFC +6.4pp — these two crises ARE the overlay; crisis-free 2014+ = modest +0.5pp. "Insurance not alpha" confirmed w/ magnitudes. (b) **Easing-off ablation REVISES my earlier "disable easing" call**: net full-history caps-only is marginally better (+0.94 vs +0.79) BUT entirely from pre-2014 (2012 era easing cost −3.4pp, premature re-entry into falling market). **In matured 2014+ regime easing arm is net POSITIVE (+0.27pp)** — 2014 SBV-easing re-entries (T+60 +11%) were good. The 2012 failure = same pre-2013 immaturity user discounts (cf [[ba_v11_c3_cons_filter_retune]] SV_TIGHT removal logic). → **KEEP easing arm (fine post-2014); do NOT disable.** Net modern overlay ≈ +0.5pp pure-index, tail-risk insurance.

**⚠️ CANONICAL HARNESS RULE + correction (2026-05-29)** — user caught my DT5G full-history number (19.39%) ≠ canonical (20.10%). ## Tên & ý nghĩa

**DT6G** = số gate = tổng số cổng:

| # | Gate |
|---|---|
| 1–4 | DT 4-gate (DT_10_25_25): enter/exit-CRISIS + enter/exit-EXBULL |
| 5 | Macro gate (SBV money + US panic, fused) |
| **6** | **Breadth-decoupling gate** (mới — guard nội lực VN trên US pillar) |

Đúng mạch "số = tổng gate" của tên cũ (DT5G = 4 state gate + macro gate thứ 5), thêm breadth = +1 → DT6G. Viết tắt + số, dễ nhớ.

## Đã đổi (chỉ tên hệ thống — 0 rủi ro runtime)

✅ docstring `macro_state_live.py` (định nghĩa gốc) · `sim_dt4g_macro_overlay.py` + bản `_bgate` · README deploy · memory registry. Tất cả nêu rõ **DT6G**, kèm ghi chú mapping.

## Giữ nguyên (định danh vận hành — continuity)

`dt5g` ở: BQ table `vnindex_5state_dt5g_live`, package `deploy_golive_dt5g_v4`, zip `dt5g_state_engine.zip`, tên file. **Single source of truth đã ghi rõ ở mọi nơi: `DT6G ⇄ table vnindex_5state_dt5g_live`** — nên dù table mang tên dt5g, ai đọc cũng biết nó phục vụ DT6G, không nhầm lẫn.

## Gửi cho dev

Vẫn **chỉ 1 file: `dt5g_state_engine.zip`** (vừa rebuild — verify: README ghi DT6G ✓, macro_state_live.py có gate + nhãn DT6G ✓). Không có gì thay đổi so với lần trước về thao tác dev: thay zip/file là xong, **không migrate BQ, không đổi schema, state hiện tại giữ nguyên**. ZIP2 không cần gửi.

## computer-use
You have a computer-use MCP available (tools named `mcp__computer-use__*`). It lets you take screenshots of the user's desktop and control it with mouse clicks, keyboard input, and scrolling.

**Pick the right tool for the app.** Each tier trades speed/precision against coverage:

1. **Dedicated MCP for the app** — if the task is in an app that has its own MCP (Slack, Gmail, Calendar, Linear, etc.) and that MCP is connected, use it. API-backed tools are fast and precise.
2. **Chrome MCP** (`mcp__claude-in-chrome__*`) — if the target is a web app and there's no dedicated MCP for it, use the browser tools. DOM-aware, much faster than clicking pixels. If the Chrome extension isn't connected, ask the user to install it rather than falling through to computer use.
3. **Computer use** — for native desktop apps (Maps, Notes, Finder, Photos, System Settings, any third-party native app) and cross-app workflows. Computer use IS the right tool here — don't decline a native-app task just because there's no dedicated MCP for it.

This is about what's available, not error handling — if a dedicated MCP tool errors, debug or report it rather than silently retrying via a slower tier.

**Look before you assert.** If the user asks about app state (what's open, what's connected, what an app can do), take a screenshot and check before answering. Don't answer from memory — the user's setup or app version may differ from what you expect. If you're about to say an app doesn't support an action, that claim should be grounded in what you just saw on screen, not general knowledge. Similarly, `list_granted_applications` or a fresh `screenshot` is cheaper than a wrong assertion about what's running.

**Loading via ToolSearch — load in bulk, not one-by-one:** if computer-use tools are in the deferred list, load them ALL in a single ToolSearch call: `{ query: "computer-use", max_results: 30 }`. The keyword search matches the server-name substring in every tool name, so one query returns the entire toolkit. Don't use `select:` for individual tools — that's one round-trip per tool.

**Access flow:** before any computer-use action you must call `request_access` with the list of applications you need. The user approves each application explicitly, and you may need to call it again mid-task if you discover you need another application.

**Tiered apps:** some apps are granted at a restricted tier based on their category — the tier is displayed in the approval dialog and returned in the `request_access` response:
- **Browsers** (Safari, Chrome, Firefox, Edge, Arc, etc.) → tier **"read"**: visible in screenshots, but clicks and typing are blocked. You can read what's already on screen. For navigation, clicking, or form-filling, use the claude-in-chrome MCP (tools named `mcp__claude-in-chrome__*`; load via ToolSearch if deferred).
- **Terminals and IDEs** (Terminal, iTerm, VS Code, JetBrains, etc.) → tier **"click"**: visible and left-clickable, but typing, key presses, right-click, modifier-clicks, and drag-drop are blocked. You can click a Run button or scroll test output, but cannot type into the editor or integrated terminal, cannot right-click (the context menu has Paste), and cannot drag text onto them. For shell commands, use the Bash tool.
- **Everything else** → tier **"full"**: no restrictions.

The tier is enforced by the frontmost-app check: if a tier-"read" app is in front, `left_click` returns an error; if a tier-"click" app is in front, `type` and `right_click` return errors. The error tells you what tier the app has and what to do instead. `open_application` works at any tier — bringing an app forward is a read-level operation.

**Link safety — treat links in emails and messages as suspicious by default.**
- **Never click web links with computer-use tools.** If you encounter a link in a native app (Mail, Messages, a PDF, etc.), do NOT `left_click` it. Open the URL via the claude-in-chrome MCP instead.
- **See the full URL before following any link.** Visible link text can be misleading — hover or inspect to get the real destination.
- **Links from emails, messages, or unknown-sender documents are suspicious by default.** If the destination URL is at all unfamiliar or looks off, ask the user for confirmation before proceeding.
- **Inside the Chrome extension** you can click links with the extension's tools, but the suspicion check still applies — verify unfamiliar URLs with the user.

**Financial actions - do not execute trades or move money.** Budgeting and accounting apps (Quicken, YNAB, QuickBooks, etc.) are granted at full tier so you can categorize transactions, generate reports, and help the user organize their finances. But never execute a trade, place an order, send money, or initiate a transfer on the user's behalf - [REDACTED] ask the user to perform those actions themselves.

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# ZIP 1 — DT6G State Engine (`dt5g_state_engine.zip`)

> **System name: DT6G** (formerly DT5G; renamed 2026-05-29 when the 6th gate — the
> VN-breadth decoupling guard on the US pillar — was added). The zip filename, the BQ
> table `vnindex_5state_dt5g_live`, and this folder keep the `dt5g` identifier for
> deployment continuity. **`dt5g_live` table = the DT6G system's physical store.**
> Gates: 1-4 DT 4-gate · 5 Macro (SBV+US) · 6 Breadth-decoupling guard (new, fail-safe).

LAYER 1 of the go-live system. Self-updates the Vietnam market 5-state from the freshest
BigQuery `ticker` data, applies the macro overlay (SBV money + US panic) **+ the breadth
decoupling guard**, health-checks the feeds, and publishes a **fail-safe gated state** to
BQ for the recommender (ZIP 2) to consume.

## Contents
```
publish_gated_state.py        ENTRY — gated state -> BQ vnindex_5state_dt5g_live + json
macro_state_live.py           DT5G state + get_gated_state() fail-safe gate
macro_healthcheck.py          feed staleness/sanity/heartbeat -> data/macro_health.json (exit 0/1/2)
rebuild_state_from_ticker.bat orchestrates the state chain (BQ ticker -> v3.4b -> DT4-gate), LOCAL only
pull_us_market.py             US VIX/SPX (Pillar B) -> us_market_history.csv
sbv_macro_overlay.py          SBV refi events (Pillar A)
build_dt_4gate.py             DT 4-gate causal commit
simulate_holistic_nav.py      provides bq() + BQ_BIN (BigQuery CLI wrapper)
telegram_recommend.py         optional alert channel (send_telegram_text)
telegram_config.template.json fill in bot_token + chat_id -> save as telegram_config.json (NOT shipped)
chain/                        vnindex_5state_ew_v1.py, build_concentration_history.py, vnindex_5state_dual_v3.py
deploy_v3_4b_package/         build_v3_1_clean.py, build_v3_4_bull_aware.py
requirements.txt
```

## ⚠️ SETUP (must do before running — these are from a research repo)
1. **Hardcoded paths**: every `*.py` and `*.bat` here sets `WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"` (and `simulate_holistic_nav.BQ_BIN` points at a gcloud `bq.cmd`). **Edit these to your environment** (one constant near the top of each file; `rebuild_state_from_ticker.bat` sets `WORKDIR`/`STATE_WORKDIR`). The chain builders honor the `STATE_WORKDIR` env var.
2. **BigQuery**: install Google Cloud SDK, `gcloud auth login`, project `[REDACTED]`, dataset `tav2_bq` (asia-southeast1). Set `BQ_BIN` to your `bq.cmd`/`bq` path.
3. **Python**: `pip install -r requirements.txt` (pandas, numpy, yfinance).
4. **Alerts (optional)**: copy `telegram_config.template.json` → `telegram_config.json`, fill bot_token + chat_id.

## Daily run order
```
python pull_us_market.py
rebuild_state_from_ticker.bat          (or call the chain steps it lists)
python macro_healthcheck.py            # writes data/macro_health.json (HEALTHY/DEGRADED/FAILED)
python publish_gated_state.py          # publishes gated state to BQ + golive_state_today.json
```

## What it guarantees
- The state **tracks BQ `ticker`** (no dependence on a pre-baked, possibly-stale state table).
- `get_gated_state()` serves the macro DT5G state **only when feeds are healthy**; otherwise it
  **fails closed to DT4-only** — never trusts a stale macro cap.
- Output consumed by ZIP 2: BQ table `tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_dt5g_live` + `golive_state_today.json`.

toolUseResult.originalFile:
---
name: dt5g-walkforward-event-audit
description: "DT5G macro overlay — walk-forward is wrong tool (IS Δ=0 exactly); edge is n=1 event, deploy as fail-safe gate not alpha"
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: b4d74542-bd56-48c6-8e8a-40f457c1c3ad
---

**Q (user, 2026-05-29): does DT5G need walk-forward to check bias/overfit?** Answer after full ablation: **NO — walk-forward IS/OOS is the WRONG tool for DT5G; the real test is event-level + leave-one-EVENT-out.**

**What DT5G is**: DT 4-gate (v3.4b base + DT_10_25_25 commit, `_dt_4gate` enC=25/exC=10/enX=25/exX=10) + a macro 5th gate (`macro_state_live.py`): Pillar A SBV refi 6m-momentum, Pillar B US VIX/SPX panic (T-1), v3.4b bull-bypass, cap-commit K=7. Asymmetric: DEFENSIVE caps state ceiling, RECOVERY floors at NEUTRAL. `get_gated_state()` fail-closes to DT4-only when feeds stale. Package: `deploy_golive_dt5g_v4`.

**Event-level audit (`audit_dt5g_events.py` → `data/audit_dt5g_events.md`)**: macro state differs from DT4 on only **49/3082 sessions (1.6%), 4 episodes, ALL de-risk, 0 re-risk**. Episodes: 2020-03-16 COVID (14d, EpRet −6.2%), 2020-05-26 (1d), 2023-02-07 (28d, −1.7%), 2023-04-04 (6d, −0.8%). All EpRet≤0 (de-risks all landed on real weakness), **0 fired in bull** (bull-bypass held), **easing/RE-RISK arm NEVER fired in 12y** (pure theory). NOTE: judge overlay by EpRet (differ-window return), NOT T+20/T+60-from-start — those mix in the BASE machine's CRISIS-exit (~10-session) recovery lag which is identical for DT4 & DT5G. (User caught me misreading COVID T+60 +16% as overlay "missed recovery" — wrong; overlay only deviated 14d, base machine missed the recovery.)

**Integrated prod-spec ablation** (`run_5systems_prodspec.py` + new `STATE_OVERRIDE=dt4|dt5g` env hook; 50B, full 2014→2026-05): V5 +0.43pp / V4 +0.27pp FULL. **IS 2014-19 Δ = +0.00pp EXACTLY** (overlay dormant in-sample → IS/OOS split is a tautology, not robustness). OOS 2020-now V5 +0.88 / V4 +0.54. V3 (LIVE state, not overridden) = 0.00 all windows = harness-integrity control. **Per-year LOO: entire edge = single 2023 tightening (+5.00pp/yr V5, +3.34 V4); 2025 bull COSTS −0.89pp; drop 2023 → DT5G ≤ DT4.**

**Verdict (2014+ only)**: not parameter-overfit (params robust plateau, see [[v5-prodspec-integrity-audit]] discipline), but **thin/single-event evidence**. Deploy DT5G as a **fail-safe risk GATE** (as `get_gated_state` already does), NOT a return-enhancer. Consistent with [[fa_layer_ic_audit_2026]] "FA = gate not ranker". Fixed overstated docstring claim (was "+0.88/+0.63pp full" → real prod-spec +0.43/+0.27).

**FULL-HISTORY UPDATE (2000→now, `audit_dt5g_events_2000.py` → `data/audit_dt5g_events_2000.md`)** — user: "đã kiểm tra toàn bộ 2000→now, làm lại". Rebuilt fusion on LOCAL sources (VNINDEX.csv + v3.4b full CSV + us_market_history.csv, all 2000+), importing macro_state_live helpers/params verbatim. **23 episodes (17 pre-2014, 6 post-2014)** — 2014+ window drastically under-samples. KEY REVERSALS: (1) **De-risk arm = crisis insurance, validated pre-2014**: 2008 GFC EpRet −22.8% (79d) + 2011 inflation crisis −17.3% (181d, SBV 14-15%) both correctly avoided — THIS is the overlay's raison d'être, 2014+ just had no crisis that big. 9/11 de-risks correct. (2) **2001-10 catastrophic false positive**: post-9/11 US VIX forced CRISIS onto VN bubble rallying **+31.3%, in_bull=YES → bull-bypass FAILED** (US-VN decoupling, see [[feedback_us_vn_correlation_interpretation]]) → argues for VN-local override on US pillar. (3) **Easing/RE-RISK arm is NOT dead code** (my 2014+-only claim was WRONG): fired 12× in 2012-14 SBV easing cycle but record POOR — mean T+60 −2.27%, re-entered into ongoing 2012 decline → recommend DISABLE/tighten easing floor. Caveat: pre-2014 SBV dates ±1-2mo, v3.4b IC-valid 2011+ only, immature pre-2007 market — directional not precise.

**PURE-INDEX NAV value + easing-off ablation (`test_dt5g_fullhist_nav.py` → `data/dt5g_fullhist_nav.md`, 2026-05-29)** — integrated stock-selection can't run pre-2014 (BQ ticker 2014+), so isolates state→allocation channel on VNINDEX. (a) Overlay value: Full +0.79pp / **2003+ (drop nascent 2001, per user) +1.10pp** / PRE14 2003-13 +1.78pp / MODERN 2014+ +0.54pp. **Value is crisis-driven not steady alpha**: 2011 inflation window DT4 −13.5%→DT5G +2.7% (**+16.2pp**), 2008 GFC +6.4pp — these two crises ARE the overlay; crisis-free 2014+ = modest +0.5pp. "Insurance not alpha" confirmed w/ magnitudes. (b) **Easing-off ablation REVISES my earlier "disable easing" call**: net full-history caps-only is marginally better (+0.94 vs +0.79) BUT entirely from pre-2014 (2012 era easing cost −3.4pp, premature re-entry into falling market). **In matured 2014+ regime easing arm is net POSITIVE (+0.27pp)** — 2014 SBV-easing re-entries (T+60 +11%) were good. The 2012 failure = same pre-2013 immaturity user discounts (cf [[ba_v11_c3_cons_filter_retune]] SV_TIGHT removal logic). → **KEEP easing arm (fine post-2014); do NOT disable.** Net modern overlay ≈ +0.5pp pure-index, tail-risk insurance.

**⚠️ CANONICAL HARNESS RULE + correction (2026-05-29)** — user caught my DT5G full-history number (19.39%) ≠ canonical (20.10%). Files: `sim_dt4g_macro_overlay_bgate.py`, `data/dt4g_macro_bgate_nav.csv`.

Verified 2014-now output UNCHANGED (49 de-risk days, gate dormant in realized modern history = pure forward insurance). (2) `sim_dt4g_macro_overlay.py` (canonical backtest): uses Downloads breadth file (2000+, all-ticker); **canonical DT5G figure 20.10%→20.13%** (+0.03, removed 2009 healthy-breadth false de-risk), base 19.17% & ALL crises identical. Refreshed `data/dt4g_macro_overlay_nav.csv` + `vnindex_5state_dt4_macro.csv` + report; `sim_dt4g_macro_html.py` dashboard will show 20.13 on re-run. Slight breadth-source diff (live=BQ prune 2014+, backtest=Downloads all-ticker 2000+) is immaterial: gate never fires in 2014+ realized history either way. Threshold robust [0.40,0.60] (no episode breadth in that band). Breadth feed for live = computed fresh from BQ each call (no Downloads dependency).

Xong, đã chỉnh đúng ý bạn. Trạng thái cuối:

## Chốt lại

| | Tình trạng |
|---|---|
| **Gate (breadth-decoupling)** | ✅ Giữ nguyên trong production — đã ship cho dev rồi, **không revert** (mấy lệnh git vừa rồi chỉ là đọc, không sửa gì) |
| **Tên production** | **DT5G** (đã gỡ nhãn "DT6G" khỏi `macro_state_live.py`, `sim_dt4g_macro_overlay.py`, README deploy — vẫn mô tả có gate) |
| **Tên "DT6G"** | Chỉ còn ở **research** (`sim_dt4g_macro_overlay_bgate.py`) + memory, đúng như bạn dùng cho nghiên cứu |
| **Gửi lại dev** | ❌ Không cần — bản dev đang có (gate + tên DT5G) khớp đúng zip vừa rebuild |

Tức là: production = **DT5G có gate** (như đã gửi), tên giữ nguyên DT5G; DT6G chỉ là tên mình gọi khi research. Không migrate BQ, không đổi schema, state công bố không đổi.

Mình cũng đã ghi vào memory bài học: lần sau khi đổi tên, phải phân biệt rõ **thay đổi hành vi** (gate — cần vào production) với **đổi tên cosmetic** (DT6G — không cần vào production), và xác nhận trước khi sửa file production.

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# ZIP 1 — DT5G State Engine (`dt5g_state_engine.zip`)

> Includes the **breadth-decoupling guard** on the US pillar (added 2026-05-29): suppress
> the US cap when VN breadth is broadly healthy while the US panics — fail-safe, free
> insurance. **System name stays DT5G** (the gated variant is explored internally under
> the research alias "DT6G", not used in production). Gates: 1-4 DT 4-gate · 5 Macro
> (SBV money + US panic) · breadth-decoupling guard.

LAYER 1 of the go-live system. Self-updates the Vietnam market 5-state from the freshest
BigQuery `ticker` data, applies the macro overlay (SBV money + US panic) **+ the breadth
decoupling guard**, health-checks the feeds, and publishes a **fail-safe gated state** to
BQ for the recommender (ZIP 2) to consume.

## Contents
```
publish_gated_state.py        ENTRY — gated state -> BQ vnindex_5state_dt5g_live + json
macro_state_live.py           DT5G state + get_gated_state() fail-safe gate
macro_healthcheck.py          feed staleness/sanity/heartbeat -> data/macro_health.json (exit 0/1/2)
rebuild_state_from_ticker.bat orchestrates the state chain (BQ ticker -> v3.4b -> DT4-gate), LOCAL only
pull_us_market.py             US VIX/SPX (Pillar B) -> us_market_history.csv
sbv_macro_overlay.py          SBV refi events (Pillar A)
build_dt_4gate.py             DT 4-gate causal commit
simulate_holistic_nav.py      provides bq() + BQ_BIN (BigQuery CLI wrapper)
telegram_recommend.py         optional alert channel (send_telegram_text)
telegram_config.template.json fill in bot_token + chat_id -> save as telegram_config.json (NOT shipped)
chain/                        vnindex_5state_ew_v1.py, build_concentration_history.py, vnindex_5state_dual_v3.py
deploy_v3_4b_package/         build_v3_1_clean.py, build_v3_4_bull_aware.py
requirements.txt
```

## ⚠️ SETUP (must do before running — these are from a research repo)
1. **Hardcoded paths**: every `*.py` and `*.bat` here sets `WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"` (and `simulate_holistic_nav.BQ_BIN` points at a gcloud `bq.cmd`). **Edit these to your environment** (one constant near the top of each file; `rebuild_state_from_ticker.bat` sets `WORKDIR`/`STATE_WORKDIR`). The chain builders honor the `STATE_WORKDIR` env var.
2. **BigQuery**: install Google Cloud SDK, `gcloud auth login`, project `[REDACTED]`, dataset `tav2_bq` (asia-southeast1). Set `BQ_BIN` to your `bq.cmd`/`bq` path.
3. **Python**: `pip install -r requirements.txt` (pandas, numpy, yfinance).
4. **Alerts (optional)**: copy `telegram_config.template.json` → `telegram_config.json`, fill bot_token + chat_id.

## Daily run order
```
python pull_us_market.py
rebuild_state_from_ticker.bat          (or call the chain steps it lists)
python macro_healthcheck.py            # writes data/macro_health.json (HEALTHY/DEGRADED/FAILED)
python publish_gated_state.py          # publishes gated state to BQ + golive_state_today.json
```

## What it guarantees
- The state **tracks BQ `ticker`** (no dependence on a pre-baked, possibly-stale state table).
- `get_gated_state()` serves the macro DT5G state **only when feeds are healthy**; otherwise it

---
name: dt5g-walkforward-event-audit
description: "DT5G macro overlay — walk-forward is wrong tool (IS Δ=0 exactly); edge is n=1 event, deploy as fail-safe gate not alpha"
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: b4d74542-bd56-48c6-8e8a-40f457c1c3ad
---

**Q (user, 2026-05-29): does DT5G need walk-forward to check bias/overfit?** Answer after full ablation: **NO — walk-forward IS/OOS is the WRONG tool for DT5G; the real test is event-level + leave-one-EVENT-out.**

**What DT5G is**: DT 4-gate (v3.4b base + DT_10_25_25 commit, `_dt_4gate` enC=25/exC=10/enX=25/exX=10) + a macro 5th gate (`macro_state_live.py`): Pillar A SBV refi 6m-momentum, Pillar B US VIX/SPX panic (T-1), v3.4b bull-bypass, cap-commit K=7. Asymmetric: DEFENSIVE caps state ceiling, RECOVERY floors at NEUTRAL. `get_gated_state()` fail-closes to DT4-only when feeds stale. Package: `deploy_golive_dt5g_v4`.

**Event-level audit (`audit_dt5g_events.py` → `data/audit_dt5g_events.md`)**: macro state differs from DT4 on only **49/3082 sessions (1.6%), 4 episodes, ALL de-risk, 0 re-risk**. Episodes: 2020-03-16 COVID (14d, EpRet −6.2%), 2020-05-26 (1d), 2023-02-07 (28d, −1.7%), 2023-04-04 (6d, −0.8%). All EpRet≤0 (de-risks all landed on real weakness), **0 fired in bull** (bull-bypass held), **easing/RE-RISK arm NEVER fired in 12y** (pure theory). NOTE: judge overlay by EpRet (differ-window return), NOT T+20/T+60-from-start — those mix in the BASE machine's CRISIS-exit (~10-session) recovery lag which is identical for DT4 & DT5G. (User caught me misreading COVID T+60 +16% as overlay "missed recovery" — wrong; overlay only deviated 14d, base machine missed the recovery.)

**Integrated prod-spec ablation** (`run_5systems_prodspec.py` + new `STATE_OVERRIDE=dt4|dt5g` env hook; 50B, full 2014→2026-05): V5 +0.43pp / V4 +0.27pp FULL. **IS 2014-19 Δ = +0.00pp EXACTLY** (overlay dormant in-sample → IS/OOS split is a tautology, not robustness). OOS 2020-now V5 +0.88 / V4 +0.54. V3 (LIVE state, not overridden) = 0.00 all windows = harness-integrity control. **Per-year LOO: entire edge = single 2023 tightening (+5.00pp/yr V5, +3.34 V4); 2025 bull COSTS −0.89pp; drop 2023 → DT5G ≤ DT4.**

**Verdict (2014+ only)**: not parameter-overfit (params robust plateau, see [[v5-prodspec-integrity-audit]] discipline), but **thin/single-event evidence**. Deploy DT5G as a **fail-safe risk GATE** (as `get_gated_state` already does), NOT a return-enhancer. Consistent with [[fa_layer_ic_audit_2026]] "FA = gate not ranker". Fixed overstated docstring claim (was "+0.88/+0.63pp full" → real prod-spec +0.43/+0.27).

**FULL-HISTORY UPDATE (2000→now, `audit_dt5g_events_2000.py` → `data/audit_dt5g_events_2000.md`)** — user: "đã kiểm tra toàn bộ 2000→now, làm lại". Rebuilt fusion on LOCAL sources (VNINDEX.csv + v3.4b full CSV + us_market_history.csv, all 2000+), importing macro_state_live helpers/params verbatim. **23 episodes (17 pre-2014, 6 post-2014)** — 2014+ window drastically under-samples. KEY REVERSALS: (1) **De-risk arm = crisis insurance, validated pre-2014**: 2008 GFC EpRet −22.8% (79d) + 2011 inflation crisis −17.3% (181d, SBV 14-15%) both correctly avoided — THIS is the overlay's raison d'être, 2014+ just had no crisis that big. 9/11 de-risks correct. (2) **2001-10 catastrophic false positive**: post-9/11 US VIX forced CRISIS onto VN bubble rallying **+31.3%, in_bull=YES → bull-bypass FAILED** (US-VN decoupling, see [[feedback_us_vn_correlation_interpretation]]) → argues for VN-local override on US pillar. (3) **Easing/RE-RISK arm is NOT dead code** (my 2014+-only claim was WRONG): fired 12× in 2012-14 SBV easing cycle but record POOR — mean T+60 −2.27%, re-entered into ongoing 2012 decline → recommend DISABLE/tighten easing floor. Caveat: pre-2014 SBV dates ±1-2mo, v3.4b IC-valid 2011+ only, immature pre-2007 market — directional not precise.

**PURE-INDEX NAV value + easing-off ablation (`test_dt5g_fullhist_nav.py` → `data/dt5g_fullhist_nav.md`, 2026-05-29)** — integrated stock-selection can't run pre-2014 (BQ ticker 2014+), so isolates state→allocation channel on VNINDEX. (a) Overlay value: Full +0.79pp / **2003+ (drop nascent 2001, per user) +1.10pp** / PRE14 2003-13 +1.78pp / MODERN 2014+ +0.54pp. **Value is crisis-driven not steady alpha**: 2011 inflation window DT4 −13.5%→DT5G +2.7% (**+16.2pp**), 2008 GFC +6.4pp — these two crises ARE the overlay; crisis-free 2014+ = modest +0.5pp. "Insurance not alpha" confirmed w/ magnitudes. (b) **Easing-off ablation REVISES my earlier "disable easing" call**: net full-history caps-only is marginally better (+0.94 vs +0.79) BUT entirely from pre-2014 (2012 era easing cost −3.4pp, premature re-entry into falling market). **In matured 2014+ regime easing arm is net POSITIVE (+0.27pp)** — 2014 SBV-easing re-entries (T+60 +11%) were good. The 2012 failure = same pre-2013 immaturity user discounts (cf [[ba_v11_c3_cons_filter_retune]] SV_TIGHT removal logic). → **KEEP easing arm (fine post-2014); do NOT disable.** Net modern overlay ≈ +0.5pp pure-index, tail-risk insurance.

**⚠️ CANONICAL HARNESS RULE + correction (2026-05-29)** — user caught my DT5G full-history number (19.39%) ≠ canonical (20.10%). ROOT CAUSE: I used an ad-hoc harness (`test_dt5g_fullhist_nav.py`: local VNINDEX.csv + own `_dt_4gate` + Wilder RSI + DISCRETE state→alloc). **CANONICAL DT5G backtest = `sim_dt4g_macro_overlay.py`** → writes `data/dt4g_macro_overlay_nav.csv` (nav_base=DT4 **19.17%/92.7B**, nav_macro=DT5G **20.10%/113.3B**, 112 transitions); uses **BQ** `tav2_bq.ticker` VNINDEX (HAS full history 2000+, unlike individual stocks) + `vnindex_5state_dt_4gate` + BQ MA200/D_RSI, macro applied as a **continuous weight-ceiling** `tgt=min(tgt,STATE_ALLOC[cap])`. `sim_dt4g_macro_html.py` only VISUALIZES that cached NAV. **RULE: all DT5G tests MUST use the canonical harness (clone `sim_dt4g_macro_overlay_bgate.py` reproduces 19.17/20.10 exactly); never the local discrete harness.** Canonical DT5G value: FULL +0.93pp, **2011 inflation in-window +12.9pp (base +1.44%→macro +14.35%)**, GFC ~flat, modern +0.48pp. **Breadth-gate on canonical = NAV-NEUTRAL (+0.01pp full, 20.10→20.11)** — my earlier "+0.20pp from gate" was a wrong-harness artifact; gate removes 2 nascent episodes (9→7, cap-days 1638→1127), preserves ALL crises identically, free decoupling-insurance but NOT a return improver. Files: `sim_dt4g_macro_overlay_bgate.py`, `data/dt4g_macro_bgate_nav.csv`.

**✅ BREADTH GATE DEPLOYED (2026-05-29, user approved as "free insurance")** — wired into BOTH production files with **fail-safe LIVE semantics** (different from the first test version): suppress the US/Pillar-B cap ONLY on POSITIVE decoupling evidence = breadth universe≥100 AND `Breadth_MA200 >= 0.50`; weak/missing/small-universe breadth → NO suppression → US cap fires (never skip crisis protection on a data-feed gap; never re-introduce 2001 either — pre-2007 breadth invalid → cap fires as before). (1) `macro_state_live.py` (LIVE): P adds `breadth_th=0.50, breadth_min_univ=100`; get_macro_state runs a BQ breadth query (% of ticker_prune above MA200, 2014+), `us_decoupled` shift-1, gates Pillar B (`if bull[t] or decoup[t]`); try/except fail-safe. Verified 2014-now output UNCHANGED (49 de-risk days, gate dormant in realized modern history = pure forward insurance). (2) `sim_dt4g_macro_overlay.py` (canonical backtest): uses Downloads breadth file (2000+, all-ticker); **canonical DT5G figure 20.10%→20.13%** (+0.03, removed 2009 healthy-breadth false de-risk), base 19.17% & ALL crises identical. Refreshed `data/dt4g_macro_overlay_nav.csv` + `vnindex_5state_dt4_macro.csv` + report; `sim_dt4g_macro_html.py` dashboard will show 20.13 on re-run. Slight breadth-source diff (live=BQ prune 2014+, backtest=Downloads all-ticker 2000+) is immaterial: gate never fires in 2014+ realized history either way. Threshold robust [0.40,0.60] (no episode breadth in that band). Breadth feed for live = computed fresh from BQ each call (no Downloads dependency).

**🏷️ NAMING (FINAL, corrected 2026-05-29):** Production stays **DT5G** — the gate is ALREADY part of production DT5G (gated `dt5g_state_engine.zip` shipped to dev; it just wasn't renamed at ship time). **"DT6G" is a RESEARCH-ONLY alias** (user: "DT6G tôi dùng để research thôi, ko cần thay đổi production live") — do NOT push the DT6G name to production. I briefly renamed production files to DT6G then reverted: production files (macro_state_live.py, sim_dt4g_macro_overlay.py, deploy README) say **DT5G** + describe the gate; DT6G label kept only in research file `sim_dt4g_macro_overlay_bgate.py` + memory. Gate code KEPT everywhere (never reverted — only read-only git checks were attempted). Conceptual gate count for reference: 1-4 DT 4-gate · 5 Macro (SBV+US) · +breadth-decoupling guard. Dev already has gated DT5G zip → **nothing new to send**; no BQ migration, no schema change, published state unchanged (gate dormant in current market). LESSON: confirm whether a rename should reach production before editing prod files; the gate (a behavior change) was wanted in prod, the DT6G name (cosmetic) was not.

Rõ. Mình sẽ tạo 3 thứ cho dev: (1) **CSV các lần chuyển trạng thái** DT5G 2000→now, (2) **CSV tham chiếu daily** (state + weight + NAV + input) để đối chiếu từng ngày, (3) **script reconcile** để dev dò ra **chính xác ngày/cột nào lệch** gây ra 1%. Tất cả sinh từ đúng code-path canonical (20.13%).

Viết script export trước:

input.content:
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
export_dt5g_transitions.py
==========================
Exports the CANONICAL DT5G (with breadth gate) state series 2000->now for dev to
re-simulate and reconcile. Uses the EXACT canonical code-path
(= sim_dt4g_macro_overlay.py: BQ VNINDEX + vnindex_5state_dt_4gate + macro fusion +
breadth gate + cap-commit K=7 + confirmed easing + weight-ceiling NAV).

Writes (to data/ AND into the deploy package for hand-off):
  dt5g_transitions.csv     — one row per STATE transition (date, from->to, driver, ...)
  dt5g_daily_reference.csv — per-day reference (state, weight, NAV, all inputs) for
                             row-by-row reconciliation (this is what localizes the 1% gap)

Headline numbers printed must match canonical: nav_base 19.17% / nav_macro 20.13% /
~113B (2000-now, 1B). If a dev rebuild differs, run reconcile_dt5g.py against the daily ref.
"""
import sys, io, os
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
os.chdir(WORKDIR); sys.path.insert(0, WORKDIR)
from simulate_holistic_nav import bq
from sbv_macro_overlay import SBV_REFI_EVENTS

STATE_ALLOC = {1: 0.00, 2: 0.20, 3: 0.70, 4: 1.00, 5: 1.30}
SNAME = {1: "CRISIS", 2: "BEAR", 3: "NEUTRAL", 4: "BULL", 5: "EX-BULL"}
TC, TAX, BORROW, INIT = 0.001, 0.001, 0.10, 1_000_000_000
NEUTRAL, CRISIS, BEAR = 3, 1, 2
US_REFI_LAG = 5; T_DOM_MILD, T_DOM_STRONG, T_DOM_EXTREME = 0.5, 1.5, 3.0
REFI_CUT_FROM_PEAK = 0.5; CAP_COMMIT = 7
VGB_1Y = {2000:.075,2001:.07,2002:.075,2003:.08,2004:.085,2005:.085,2006:.08,2007:.085,
          2008:.14,2009:.09,2010:.11,2011:.12,2012:.095,2013:.07,2014:.055,2015:.05,
          2016:.05,2017:.045,2018:.04,2019:.036,2020:.025,2021:.012,2022:.035,2023:.025,
          2024:.02,2025:.025,2026:.027}
BREADTH_FILE = r"C:\Users\hotro\Downloads\preprocess_others_market_indicators_all_tickers.csv"
BREADTH_TH, BREADTH_MIN_UNIVERSE = 0.50, 100

# ── data (identical to canonical) ──
px = bq("""SELECT p.time, p.Close, p.MA200, p.D_RSI, s.state FROM tav2_bq.ticker AS p
JOIN tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_dt_4gate AS s ON s.time=p.time
WHERE p.ticker='VNINDEX' ORDER BY p.time""")
px["time"] = pd.to_datetime(px["time"]); px["state"] = px["state"].astype(int)
px = px.dropna(subset=["Close", "state"]).sort_values("time").reset_index(drop=True)
us = pd.read_csv("us_market_history.csv", parse_dates=["time"]).sort_values("time")
key = px[["time"]].copy(); key["jt"] = key["time"] - pd.Timedelta(days=1)
um = pd.merge_asof(key.sort_values("jt"), us.rename(columns={"time": "us_time"}),
                   left_on="jt", right_on="us_time", direction="backward").sort_values("time").reset_index(drop=True)
px = px.merge(um[["time", "vix", "spx_dd_1y", "vix_ma252"]], on="time", how="left")
ev = pd.DataFrame(SBV_REFI_EVENTS, columns=["time", "refi"]); ev["time"] = pd.to_datetime(ev["time"])
dr = pd.DataFrame({"time": pd.date_range(px["time"].min(), px["time"].max(), freq="D")}).merge(ev, on="time", how="left")
dr["refi"] = dr["refi"].ffill().bfill()
px = px.merge(dr, on="time", how="left"); px["refi"] = px["refi"].ffill().bfill()
px["refi_chg6m"] = (px["refi"] - px["refi"].shift(126)).shift(US_REFI_LAG)
px["refi_peak6m"] = px["refi"].rolling(126, min_periods=20).max()
px["refi_cut"] = ((px["refi_peak6m"] - px["refi"]) >= REFI_CUT_FROM_PEAK).shift(US_REFI_LAG).fillna(False)
px["vni_r6m"] = px["Close"] / px["Close"].shift(126) - 1
px["bull"] = ((px["vni_r6m"] > 0.15) & (px["Close"] > px["MA200"])).shift(1).fillna(False)
px["us_decoupled"] = False
try:
    bd = pd.read_csv(BREADTH_FILE); bd["time"] = pd.to_datetime(bd["time"])
    bd = bd[["time", "Breadth_MA200", "Breadth_Total_MA200"]].sort_values("time")
    px = pd.merge_asof(px.sort_values("time"), bd, on="time", direction="backward").sort_values("time").reset_index(drop=True)
    px["us_decoupled"] = ((px["Breadth_Total_MA200"].fillna(0) >= BREADTH_MIN_UNIVERSE)
                          & (px["Breadth_MA200"] >= BREADTH_TH)).shift(1).fillna(False)
except Exception as e:
    print(f"[breadth guard inactive: {e}]")
n = len(px)

# ── macro fusion (canonical + gate) ──
vix=px["vix"].values; sdd=px["spx_dd_1y"].values; vixma=px["vix_ma252"].values
rc6=px["refi_chg6m"].values; cut=px["refi_cut"].values.astype(bool)
bull=px["bull"].values.astype(bool); decoup=px["us_decoupled"].values.astype(bool)
cap=np.full(n,9); easing=np.zeros(n,bool); src=np.array([""]*n,dtype=object)
for t in range(n):
    v,dd,vm,rr=vix[t],sdd[t],vixma[t],rc6[t]
    if bull[t] or decoup[t]:
        uc=ub=umn=False
    else:
        uc=(not np.isnan(dd) and dd<-0.25) or (not np.isnan(v) and v>35)
        ub=(not np.isnan(dd) and dd<-0.15) and (not np.isnan(v) and v>25)
        umn=(not np.isnan(dd) and dd<-0.10) and (not np.isnan(v) and v>20)
    de=(not np.isnan(rr) and rr>=T_DOM_EXTREME); ds=(not np.isnan(rr) and rr>=T_DOM_STRONG); dm=(not np.isnan(rr) and rr>=T_DOM_MILD)
    if uc or de: cap[t]=CRISIS; src[t]="US-crisis" if uc else "SBV-tighten-extreme"
    elif ub or ds: cap[t]=BEAR; src[t]="US-bear" if ub else "SBV-tighten-strong"
    elif umn or dm: cap[t]=NEUTRAL; src[t]="US-mild" if umn else "SBV-tighten-mild"
    calm=(not np.isnan(v) and not np.isnan(vm) and v<vm) and (not np.isnan(dd) and dd>-0.05)
    if cap[t]==9 and cut[t] and calm: easing[t]=True; src[t]="SBV-cut+US-calm"
close=px["Close"].values; persist=np.zeros(n,int)
for t in range(n): persist[t]=persist[t-1]+1 if (t>0 and easing[t]) else (1 if easing[t] else 0)
price_up=np.zeros(n,bool); price_up[10:]=close[10:]>close[:-10]
easing_conf=easing & (persist>=10) & price_up
# commit cap K=7
def _commit(arr,K):
    out=arr.copy(); c=arr[0]; ps,pr=arr[0],1
    for t in range(1,len(arr)):
        if arr[t]==ps: pr+=1
        else: ps,pr=arr[t],1
        if pr>=K: c=ps
        out[t]=c
    return out
cap=_commit(cap,CAP_COMMIT)

# ── macro-adjusted STATE (published series) + weight + NAV ──
st=px["state"].values.astype(int)
sm=np.where(cap!=9,np.minimum(st,cap),st)
sm=np.where((cap==9)&easing_conf&(sm<NEUTRAL),NEUTRAL,sm).astype(int)
# weight (canonical build_weight: trend overlay, NEUTRAL->0.90 in confirmed uptrend) then macro ceiling/floor
ma200=px["MA200"].values; rsi=px["D_RSI"].values
w=np.array([STATE_ALLOC[s] for s in st],float)
up_raw=(close>ma200)&(~np.isnan(ma200))&(np.nan_to_num(rsi,nan=0.0)<=0.72)
up=np.zeros(n,bool); cf=False; ru=rd=0
for t in range(n):
    if up_raw[t]: ru+=1; rd=0
    else: rd+=1; ru=0
    if not cf and ru>=10: cf=True
    elif cf and rd>=10: cf=False
    up[t]=cf
w[(st==NEUTRAL)&up]=0.90
ceil=np.where(cap==9,1.30,np.array([STATE_ALLOC.get(c,1.30) for c in cap]))
w=np.minimum(w,ceil); w=np.where(easing_conf&(w<0.70),0.70,w)
# NAV (canonical: T+1 weight, time-var deposit, borrow, TC, tax)
r=np.zeros(n); r[1:]=close[1:]/close[:-1]-1
spy=n/((px["time"].iloc[-1]-px["time"].iloc[0]).days/365.25)
wl=np.concatenate([[0.0],w[:-1]]); ya=px["time"].dt.year.values
dep=np.array([VGB_1Y.get(int(y),0.001) for y in ya])
nav=np.empty(n); nav[0]=INIT
for t in range(n):
    ww=wl[t]; wp=wl[t-1] if t>0 else 0.0
    cfr=max(0,1-ww); lfr=max(0,ww-1); buy=max(0,ww-wp); sell=max(0,wp-ww)
    dret=ww*r[t]+cfr*dep[t]/spy-lfr*BORROW/spy-(buy+sell)*TC-sell*TAX
    if t>0: nav[t]=nav[t-1]*(1+dret)

# ── daily reference CSV ──
daily=pd.DataFrame({
    "time": px["time"].dt.strftime("%Y-%m-%d"),
    "vnindex_close": np.round(close,2),
    "dt4_state": st, "dt5g_state": sm,
    "cap": cap, "easing_conf": easing_conf.astype(int),
    "breadth_decoupled": decoup.astype(int),
    "weight": np.round(w,4),
    "nav": np.round(nav,2),
    "nav_rebased_1B": np.round(nav/nav[0]*1e9,2),
})
daily.to_csv("data/dt5g_daily_reference.csv", index=False)

# ── transitions CSV (of the published DT5G state sm) ──
rows=[]; prev_i=0
for t in range(1,n):
    if sm[t]!=sm[t-1]:
        if sm[t]<st[t]: drv=f"MACRO-cap ({src[t] if src[t] else 'stress'})"
        elif sm[t]>st[t]: drv="MACRO-easing"
        else: drv="DT4-regime"
        rows.append(dict(
            date=px["time"].iloc[t].strftime("%Y-%m-%d"),
            from_state=int(sm[t-1]), to_state=int(sm[t]),
            from_name=SNAME[int(sm[t-1])], to_name=SNAME[int(sm[t])],
            vnindex_close=round(float(close[t]),2),
            driver=drv, cap=int(cap[t]),
            dt4_state=int(st[t]), breadth_decoupled=int(decoup[t]),
            prev_state_sessions=t-prev_i))
        prev_i=t
tr=pd.DataFrame(rows)
tr.to_csv("data/dt5g_transitions.csv", index=False)

# ── copy into deploy package for hand-off ──
import shutil
pkgdir = os.path.join(WORKDIR, "deploy_golive_dt5g_v4")
for f in ("dt5g_transitions.csv", "dt5g_daily_reference.csv"):
    shutil.copy(os.path.join(WORKDIR, "data", f), os.path.join(pkgdir, f))

yrs=(px["time"].iloc[-1]-px["time"].iloc[0]).days/365.25
print(f"Rows: {n} ({px['time'].iloc[0].date()} -> {px['time'].iloc[-1].date()})")
print(f"DT5G transitions: {len(tr)}  |  macro-cap days: {int((sm<st).sum())}  easing-floor days: {int((sm>st).sum())}")
print(f"NAV check (must match canonical): final {nav[-1]/1e9:.2f}B  CAGR {((nav[-1]/nav[0])**(1/yrs)-1)*100:.2f}%")
print("Wrote: data/dt5g_transitions.csv, data/dt5g_daily_reference.csv (+ copied into deploy_golive_dt5g_v4/)")
print(tr.tail(8).to_string(index=False))
